results.name: rosy the riveter
results.description: the historic World War II figure.

results.name: rothga
results.description: The Phyrexian beast Lukka bonded with (which compleated him)

results.name: rulebook style
results.description: The pen/ink style common in the DnD rulebooks, usually with a simple colored background and an off-white textured card background.

results.name: rule of law
results.description: Cards that limit the number of spells a player can cast each turn.

results.name: rules nightmare
results.description: Cards that are known for having interactions that are difficult or nearly impossible to resolve within comprehensive rules

results.name: rummage
results.description: Discard a card, then draw a card. Mainly red. See also [loot](/tags/card/loot), the blue version, which draws then discards.

results.name: rummage to library
results.description: Rummage with the discarded cards tucked in your library.

results.name: runeterra
results.description: The setting for League of Legends

results.name: run-on ability text
results.description: Prints that have multiple abilities sharing the same line of text, where nowadays they would need to be separate lines.

results.name: rupture spire
results.description: Not only does this land enter tapped, it also requires you to tap another land when you play it.

results.name: ruric thar
results.description: A two-headed ogre of Gruul. His heads think independently: one is Ruric, the other is Thar.

results.name: ryne waters
results.description: The Oracle of Light, formerly possessed by Minfilia.

results.name: sabaton
results.description: Sabatons are armor that protect the feet, sometimes referred to as sollerets.

results.name: saber
results.description: A catch-all term encompassing single-edged swords featuring a curved blade.

results.name: saboteur
results.description: Effects that trigger when you deal damage to an opponent.

results.name: sacrifice cost land
results.description: Lands that require you to sacrifice another land before they come into play.
